_comment: Per-category minimum gates for `npm run bench`, set conservatively below the measured v0.6.0 baseline (466 samples: precision 100% / 0% FP; recall 73.8-87.5%). The evasion tier intentionally suppresses recall; gates leave ~8-12 points of headroom so genuine detector regressions fail CI without flaking on dataset evolution. tests/bench-gate.test.ts proves the gate fails when a gate is raised above the baseline.
